collections.name: users
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_users_cpf` ON `users` (cpf) WHERE cpf != ''

collections.name: clinics
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_clinics_cnpj ON clinics (cnpj) WHERE cnpj != ''

collections.name: clinic_professionals
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_cp_unique` ON `clinic_professionals` (clinic, professional) WHERE deleted_at = ''

collections.name: patients
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_patients_cpf ON patients (cpf) WHERE cpf != ''

collections.name: patient_professionals
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_pp_unique` ON `patient_professionals` (patient, professional) WHERE deleted_at = ''

collections.name: referrals
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_referrals_token ON referrals (token) WHERE token != ''

collections.name: coupons
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_coupons_code ON coupons (code) WHERE code != ''

collections.name: convites_paciente
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_convites_token ON convites_paciente (token)

collections.name: profile_audit_log
indexes: CREATE INDEX idx_profile_audit_created ON profile_audit_log (created DESC)
